meta.title: MEVA Cloud — Visual Sample EN/JP
hero.title:
Human motion data
for Physical AI.
hero.lead: A teaser gallery of multimodal human behavior datasets captured with e-skin MEVA — motion, video, pressure and context for Physical AI.
peek.walk.title: Walking & Turning
peek.factory.title: Factory Reach Task
peek.pressure.title: Foot Pressure Motion
datasets.title: Featured datasets
datasets.lead: Each dataset has its own sample request flow. Click a card’s request button, enter an email address, agree to the privacy policy, and receive a time-limited link for that dataset only.
dataset.walk.title: Walking & Turning
dataset.walk.desc: Indoor gait samples with stops, turns and synchronized motion/video previews for robot learning and gait analysis.
dataset.factory.title: Factory Reach Task
dataset.factory.desc: Upper-body reaching and handling movements with posture load indicators for ergonomics and work analysis.
dataset.pressure.title: Foot Pressure Motion
dataset.pressure.desc: Synchronized lower-body motion and pressure distribution for contact-rich movement understanding.
download.walk.text: Send a time-limited download link for Walking & Turning.
download.factory.text: Send a time-limited download link for Factory Reach Task.
download.pressure.text: Send a time-limited download link for Foot Pressure Motion.
download.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and receive this dataset download link.
modalities.title: Multimodal by design
modalities.lead: MEVA Cloud should feel less like a file server and more like a structured human behavior data infrastructure.
modality.motion.title: Motion
modality.motion.desc: Skeleton, BVH, CSV and future SMPL-X style formats for movement learning.
modality.vision.title: Vision
modality.vision.desc: Third-person and future EgoVision previews to preserve visual context.
modality.pressure.title: Pressure
modality.pressure.desc: Foot, seat or environment pressure maps connected to human movement.
modality.robot.title: Robot-ready
modality.robot.desc: Clean metadata, labels and downloadable packages for Physical AI pipelines.
